findings.summary: The newly added updateRun method in WorkerLoopDeps is not mocked in the test files, and stale runRepository properties were left behind, which creates a coverage hole and risk of runtime crashes in tests if updateRun is triggered.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the stale runRepository mock property and add updateRun: vi.fn() to the base WorkerLoopDeps mock objects in both apps/api/src/__tests__/worker-drain-loop.test.ts and packages/application/src/executor/__tests__/worker-loop.test.ts.
